examples: The introduction of gunpowder gradually made the bow and arrow obsolete, particularly in Western Europe
The potentially lethal device was made from a length of hose packed with gunpowder, primers, and shrapnel.
The 24 Solar Terms is regarded as China's fifth great invention, after papermaking, printing, the compass and gunpowder.
Shotgun rounds are brass-and-plastic cylinders densely packed with gunpowder and tiny pellets, or shot.
Instead of gunpowder or rocket motors, the railgun will use electrical power to propel the projectiles.
